steps.title: State the assumption
steps.content: The assumption is that domed nests provide weather protection and therefore allow the species that build them to have larger geographic ranges than open-nest species. A challenge must show the opposite range pattern.

steps.title: Focus on geographic range
steps.content: A concerns extinction rates, B concerns body size, and C concerns nest-building materials. Those findings do not test whether domed nests are associated with larger ranges. A finding that open-nest species have larger ranges would directly challenge the assumption. The answer is D.
